title: 英國有隻單車口罩Filters 99.9% of PM2.5.....有無用

replies.msg:
https://www.amazon.co.uk/CYCL-Face-Guard-Pollution-Scarf/dp/B07X5LP8SK/ref=sr_1_4?dchild=1&keywords=CYCL&qid=1581738142&sr=8-4&th=1

Face Guard comes ready-to-use thanks to the integrated PM2.5 nanofiber filter (filters 99.9% of PM 2.5)
Protects from diesel fumes, dust, smog and allergen. Filters 99% of diesel fumes with 99% of UV cut ratio
product
Breathability is ensured by the hand-washable cotton and nanofiber membrane composition that is key to face guard’s extended lifespan
One size fits all - with adjustable nose strip and elastic closure to provide minimal air leakage for any face shape

有來普通落街頂唔頂到
